column1: # Comments (`#`) and blank lines are ignored.
# - `jvm_runtime_ops` is what `ai.operations()` reports after a single
#   includes runtime helper bumps (e.g. the string-add helper bumps
#   the counter for the allocation it performs).
# - `static_emit_ops` is the sum of the `N`s inside every `ops(...)`
#   call emitted into the generated Java source. Used by
#   backend produces the same `ops(VAL, N)` wrappers the Java
#   reference does. Both backends agree on this even when runtime
# When you add a case here, both columns must reflect the upstream
# JVM run can capture them in one shot.

column4: var a = 7 var x = a * 3 return x
function f(n) { return n * n } var x = f(3) return x
